meta.name: S-Coin Comment Templates - Emotional Impact Set V3
meta.description: 300 unique S-Coin review helper templates with high emotional impact. Accurately reflects S-Coin mechanics: high percentage earn on selected products, and 100% FREE redemption on selected items. Written in natural Malaysian Malay/Manglish style.

scoin_context.earn: Customer buys selected product and receives a high percentage back as S-Coin (e.g., 50%, 70% of product value). The S-Coin accumulates in their account for future use.
scoin_context.redeem: Customer can use accumulated S-Coin to fully redeem selected items at 100% — completely FREE. Customer chooses what they want as long as they have enough S-Coin. Like a free gift but customer picks the item.

meta.recommended_use: Use only as a starting point for real customers to edit based on their actual shopping and S-Coin experience.

earn: {item}
{price}
{percent}
{netValue}
redeem: {item}
{points}
{value}

notes: Earn comments reflect the excitement of getting a high percentage of spend back as S-Coin.
Redeem comments reflect the joy of getting items 100% FREE — zero payment.
Avoid adding RM before {price}, {netValue}, or {value} if those values are already formatted with RM.
Emotional tone: excitement, disbelief, satisfaction, pride, gratitude.
Designed for the existing Review Helper app structure.
